text.title: embeddings-evaluation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for embeddings-evaluation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using synthetic benchmarks (LLM-generated query-document pairs) as the primary evaluation signal.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Synthetic queries match model training distributions and produce inflated recall numbers. Real user queries contain typos, ambiguity, and domain jargon that synthetic queries omit. Always validate with real queries.

failure-mode.description: Comparing models only on latency and cost, skipping quality measurement.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A 10x cheaper model with 20% lower recall can cost more in business terms (missed results, user drop-off) than the savings. Always measure quality first, then optimize within the quality constraint.
